<!-- rnb-source-begin  -->

```r
swiss_gdp_tidy |> 
  select(Canton, Year,percent_financial) |> # Selects only the columns of interest
  filter(Canton==\Ticino\" | Canton==\"Vaud\") |> # Selects only the cantons of interest
values_from = percent_financial) |> # create the two columns

column1: mutate(fin_perc_diff=Vaud-Ticino)  # Compute the difference between the two columns
